meaning: 高尔半岛[英国威尔士南部]
examples: I want a full account of your movements the night Mr. Gower was killed.
Gower was the highest scorer in the match.
Talia has phoned Nick from the Gower Building.
The Gower Peninsula, with its broad butterscotch beaches and pounding breakers, is home to the Welsh surfing industry.
Agogo and Gower both came close to levelling but Margate held on despite some desperate defending.
